new_today: addyosmani/agent-skills: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents (workflows, quality gates)
agentskills.io: Official open standard + specification for Agent Skills (SKILL.md, resources, progressive disclosure)
anthropics/skills: Large public catalog demonstrating Claude skills system (creative + engineering domains)
SHACL 1.2 Core (W3C): sh:agentInstruction, sh:intent — formal validation + agent instructions for skill bundles
SSSOM: Simple Standard for Sharing Ontology Mappings — agent-driven curation rules, mapping metadata for skills
notes: Iteration 33: 5 new high-signal sources focused on core spec (agentskills.io), major implementations (addyosmani 68k, anthropics 157k), and formal context layers (SHACL 1.2 agent primitives + SSSOM curation).
